mapper.select: SELECT id, profit_no, order_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, agent_merchant_no, agent_merchant_name, agent_level, order_amount, fee_amount, profit_amount, commission_rate, settle_date, profit_status, settlement_id, settlement_no, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_profit_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND agent_merchant_no = #{agentMerchantNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, profit_no, order_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, agent_merchant_no, agent_merchant_name, agent_level, order_amount, fee_amount, profit_amount, commission_rate, settle_date, profit_status, settlement_id, settlement_no, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_profit_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND settle_date = #{settleDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, profit_no, order_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, agent_merchant_no, agent_merchant_name, agent_level, order_amount, fee_amount, profit_amount, commission_rate, settle_date, profit_status, settlement_id, settlement_no, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM agent_profit_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND profit_no = #{profitNo} LIMIT 1
